name: SiteOne Landscape Supply, Inc.
business: We are the largest and only national full product line wholesale distributor of landscape supplies in the United States and have an established presence in Canada. Our customers are primarily residential and commercial landscape professionals who specialize in the design, installation, and maintenance of lawns, gardens, golf courses, and other outdoor spaces.

exposures.sentence: Approximately 60% of our 2025 Fiscal Year Net sales were derived from the residential construction sector.
32% from the commercial construction (including institutional) sector.
Our control products are specialty products that include herbicides, fungicides, rodenticides, and other pesticides.
We have continued to advance our digital initiative, to include the enhancement of our website and business-to-business (B2B) e-Commerce platform.
cybersecurity incidents involving our systems or third-party systems

catalysts.sentence: We plan to continue expanding our Solstice line of products in the 2026 Fiscal Year.
We expect capital expenditures to be in a range of 0.8% to 1.3% as a percentage of Net sales for the 2026 Fiscal Year.

tamClaims.claim: Addressable market in North America for wholesale distribution of landscape supplies is approximately $25 billion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on management's estimates, we believe that our addressable market in North America for the wholesale distribution of landscape supplies represented approximately $25 billion in revenue in the 2025 Fiscal Year.
